Craig Dawson has today joined Premier League side Watford for an undisclosed fee.

The 29-year-old centre-half arrived at The Hawthorns from Rochdale in 2010 and made 225 appearances for the Baggies, scoring 15 goals.

The Club wishes Craig and his family all the very best in the future.
